title: WebhookEndpoint
description: A registered webhook endpoint. CDP delivers signed events to this URL. The signing secret is returned only at creation time — it cannot be retrieved after that.

url.description: The HTTPS URL where CDP will deliver events.

enabled_events.description: List of event types to deliver. Use ['*'] for all events.

status.description: Whether this endpoint is actively receiving events.

secret.description: The HMAC-SHA256 signing secret. Returned ONLY at creation time. Null in all subsequent reads. If lost, rotate via POST /v1/webhook-endpoints/{id}/rotate-secret.
